# Fixture Snapshot

`conformance/` is a pinned copy of
`Agentic-User-Mandate-Protocol/conformance` fixtures from commit
`382337a4810a963dc9d15f7903fedb65b46ed767`.

Local workspace tests prefer `../conformance/fixtures` when present. This
snapshot exists so repo-local CI can still validate the SDK without cross-repo
private checkout credentials.
